description: A property has successfully closed. The TC needs to perform the final steps to close the file.

nodes.task_description: Obtain the final closing statement and deed from the title company.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent receives and verifies the final documents.

nodes.task_description: Upload all final documents to the transaction system and ensure the file is complete for compliance.

expected_outcome.expected: All closing documents are added to the file, and the file passes a compliance check.

nodes.task_description: Change the status of the listing to 'Sold' in the MLS.

expected_outcome.expected: The MLS listing is updated with the final sale price and status.
